scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @pap/storage-sqlite build && pnpm --filter @pap/runtime build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-echo build && tsx src/index.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pap/storage-sqlite build && pnpm --filter @pap/runtime build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-echo build && tsc -b tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @pap/storage-sqlite build && pnpm --filter @pap/runtime build && pnpm --filter @pap/capability-echo build && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
